title: leucas royleoides
intro: Leucas royleoides, also known as Kasa or Kasani, is a perennial herb belonging to the family Lamiaceae, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic activities. Leucas royleoides has been found to provide several health benefits, such as treating fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, as well as acting as a natural remedy for wounds and skin infections. The plant is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its herbal preparations are often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, although its safety and efficacy may vary depending on the dosage and individual tolerance.
